title: androya decaryi
intro: Androya decaryi, also known as the velvet star or velvet-leaved velvet star, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Androya decaryi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
